name: a3_dead_code
outcome_goal: Net-negative diff on public; every deleted symbol has grep evidence of zero callers recorded in the PR description.
verify_command: bash -lc "git diff --stat public..HEAD | tail -1 | rg 'deletions' >/dev/null && pytest -q && praxis workflow discover reindex --yes"

jobs.label: a3_dead_code
jobs.prompt: Delete only symbols with grep/discover evidence of zero live callers. Targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/__init__.py __getattr__; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/execution/__init__.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/__init__.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_supervisor_compatibility.py; any file matching *_compat*, *_shim*, legacy_*. Standing order: unused shims before live facades. Produce a net-negative branch diff. PR description must show symbol -> evidence command -> zero-caller result. Transport constraint: use admitted CLI transport only; do not use llm_task, HTTP API routes, Anthropic routes, or deprecated Claude 4.6 slugs.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "git diff --stat public..HEAD | tail -1 | rg 'deletions' >/dev/null && pytest -q && praxis workflow discover reindex --yes"
